The question aims to find out the difference in wins between Dan Alon and Yehuda Weissenstein in their respective fencing events. We need to look at the relevant rows in the table that describe their performances, which are row 4 for Dan Alon (w5–l5) and row 5 for Yehuda Weissenstein (w2–l8) to get the answer.

Dan Alon has a performance of "w5–l5" which means he had 5 wins. Yehuda Weissenstein has a performance of "w2–l8" which means he had 2 wins. The difference in wins between Dan Alon and Yehuda Weissenstein is 5 - 2 = 3 wins.
